typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Cfg_DataDateFormat as string (),
	Cfg_DataDateFormatDelimiter as string (),
	Cfg_ImportFileId as integer (),
	Cfg_ImportRunId as integer (),
	Cfg_LookbackToPreviousScheduledDay as boolean (),
	Cfg_PandoroEndpointUrl as string (),
	Cfg_ScheduleName as string (),
	Cfg_SourceFile as string ()
}

source(output(
		{Column 0} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FlatFileSource
FlatFileSource derive({Column 0} = {Column 0}) ~> PlaceHolderFlatFileValidator
FlatFileSource derive() ~> FlatFileSourceErrorReformat
PlaceHolderFlatFileValidator derive(ImportFileId = $Package__Cfg_ImportFileId,
		ImportRunId = $Package__Cfg_ImportRunId) ~> AddImportIds
PlaceHolderFlatFileValidator derive(ErrorCode = ErrorCode,
		ErrorColumn = ErrorColumn,
		ErrorDescription = ErrorDescription,
		RowNo = RowNo,
		{} = {}) ~> FlatFileValidatorErrorReformat
FlatFileSourceErrorReformat derive(ImportRunId = $Package__Cfg_ImportRunId,
		ErrorLevel = 10102,
		ImportFileId = $Package__Cfg_ImportFileId,
		Message = left('Unable to read data : ' + toString(Flat_File_Source_Error_Output_Column), 255)) ~> Error10102
FlatFileSourceErrorReformat derive() ~> FlatFileSource0
AddImportIds derive(BaseUnits = MV,
		AccountId = Plan_id,
		AssetName = Fund_id,
		MarketValue = MV,
		RowNumber = RowNo) ~> Remapcolumnnames
FlatFileValidatorErrorReformat derive(ImportRunId = $Package__Cfg_ImportRunId,
		ErrorLevel = 10101,
		ImportFileId = $Package__Cfg_ImportFileId) ~> Error10101
FlatFileValidatorErrorReformat derive(ErrorCode = ErrorCode,
		ErrorColumn = ErrorColumn,
		ErrorDescription = ErrorDescription,
		RowNo = RowNo,
		{} = {}) ~> FlatFileValidator0
Error10102 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		ImportRunId,
		Message,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10102
FlatFileSource0 sink(input(
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn()) ~> FlatFileSourceERROROUTPUTFILE
Remapcolumnnames derive(BaseUnits = BaseUnits) ~> PlaceHolderParseDate
Error10101 sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ImportRunId as integer,
		Message as string,
		ErrorLevel as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		RowNumber = RowNo,
		ImportRunId,
		Message = ErrorDescription,
		ErrorLevel)) ~> Importerror10101
FlatFileValidator0 sink(input(
		ErrorCode as integer,
		ErrorColumn as integer,
		ErrorDescription as string,
		RowNo as integer,
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		ErrorCode,
		ErrorColumn,
		ErrorDescription,
		RowNo,
		{})) ~> FlatFileValidatorERROROUTPUTFILE
PlaceHolderParseDate sink(input(
		ImportFileId as integer,
		BaseUnits as string,
		MarketValue as string,
		RowNumber as integer,
		ValuationDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ImportRunId as integer,
		AccountId as string,
		AssetName as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		ImportFileId,
		BaseUnits,
		MarketValue,
		RowNumber,
		ValuationDate = ValuationDateParsed,
		ImportRunId,
		AccountId,
		AssetName)) ~> Channelassetextract
